message:
Reject empty RESP array frames in AOF record parsing

Add early-return guard in AofRecord::from_resp_frame() for empty
RESP arrays (zero-element *0\r\n frames), which represent malformed
AOF records that would produce commands with no argv. Previously
these would pass validation and create empty AofRecords.

- crates/fr-persist/src/lib.rs: empty array check returning
  PersistError::InvalidFrame, plus 2 tests (empty_array_record_rejected,
  decode_rejects_empty_command_array_record)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
